title: Generate hero and section images matching uploaded design reference

requirements.text: Integrate all generated images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated and render them in their correct sections: hero photo in the hero section, group home photo in the Youth Group Homes banner, horse/animal interaction photos in the Horse and Animal Interactions section, adult day programming activity photo in the Adult Day Programming section, and gallery images in the 'A Look Inside Our Homes' carousel.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays a warm, professional care-provider photo on the right side of the hero layout
Youth Group Homes banner displays a photo of children/youth in a nurturing group home environment
Horse and Animal Interactions section displays two stacked photos of participants engaged with animals
Adult Day Programming section displays a photo of adults engaged in group activities
Gallery section carousel displays at least 4 distinct facility/home interior and community activity photos with location captions
All images are loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated as static assets
No broken image links appear anywhere on the page

constraints: All images must be served as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated — do not route image delivery through the backend canister
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Adding new page sections beyond those already specified in existing features
Changing the color theme or typography established in the existing visual theme feature

required: Smiling Black male healthcare professional in blue scrubs holding a tablet, warm natural indoor lighting, friendly and approachable expression, upper-body portrait against a soft blurred home background (hero-professional.dim_600x700.png)
Diverse group of children and teenagers engaged in structured activities around a table in a bright, modern group home living space, warm natural light (youth-group-home.dim_800x500.png)
Two women and a child laughing and interacting together indoors in a bright living room, candid joyful moment (horse-interaction-1.dim_400x300.png)
Small group of young adults and a teenager smiling and engaged in a tabletop craft or board game activity (horse-interaction-2.dim_400x300.png)

Group of adults with developmental disabilities engaged in a joyful group activity around a table, colorful art supplies and snacks visible, bright community center setting (adult-day-activity.dim_500x380.png)
Bright modern shared living room interior of a group home, tidy and welcoming, natural light through windows (gallery-home-1.dim_400x300.png)
Diverse group of adults participating in a community day center activity, smiling and engaged (gallery-day-center.dim_400x300.png)
Adults with disabilities enjoying outdoor community recreation, sunny day, park or garden setting (gallery-community-rec.dim_400x300.png)
Professional caregiver sitting with an elderly or adult client in a comfortable home setting, warm and reassuring atmosphere (gallery-respite.dim_400x300.png)
